parameters.jsCode:
const workerId = `wf2_${$execution.id.substring(0, 12)}_${Date.now()}`;
return [{ json: { worker_id: workerId } }];

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO worker_locks(lock_key, owner_id, heartbeat_at)
VALUES ('cold_email_worker', $1, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (lock_key) DO UPDATE
SET owner_id = EXCLUDED.owner_id,
    heartbeat_at = NOW()
WHERE worker_locks.heartbeat_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
RETURNING lock_key, owner_id, heartbeat_at;

UPDATE leads
SET email_status = 'queued',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE email_status = 'sending'
  AND updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'
RETURNING id;

WITH next_lead AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM leads
  WHERE email_status = 'queued'
    AND email_valid = true
    AND last_email_sent_at IS NULL
    AND unsubscribed_at IS NULL
  ORDER BY created_at ASC
  LIMIT 1
  FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
)
UPDATE leads l
SET email_status = 'sending',
    updated_at = NOW()
FROM next_lead
WHERE l.id = next_lead.id
RETURNING l.id, l.email, l.full_name, l.first_name, l.last_name,
          l.category, l.language, l.country, l.campus,
          l.tipo_producto, l.titling, l.facultad, l.phone;
DELETE FROM worker_locks WHERE lock_key = 'cold_email_worker' AND owner_id = $1;

INSERT INTO email_messages (lead_id, campaign_type, subject, body_html, body_text, status, idempotency_key)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.lead_id }}'::uuid,
  'cold_email',
  $n8nsubj${{ $json.subject }}$n8nsubj$,
  $n8nhtml${{ $json.body_html }}$n8nhtml$,
  $n8ntxt${{ $json.body_text }}$n8ntxt$,
  'sending',
  '{{ $json.idempotency_key }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (idempotency_key) WHERE idempotency_key IS NOT NULL
DO UPDATE SET
  status = 'sending',
  retry_count = CASE
    WHEN email_messages.status = 'failed'
    THEN email_messages.retry_count + 1
    ELSE email_messages.retry_count
  END,
  subject = EXCLUDED.subject,
  body_html = EXCLUDED.body_html,
  body_text = EXCLUDED.body_text,
  error_message = NULL,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id, retry_count;

-- Mark message failed
UPDATE email_messages SET status = 'failed', error_message = $2, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1;

-- Requeue lead o marcar failed si max retries
UPDATE leads
SET email_status = CASE
      WHEN (SELECT retry_count FROM email_messages WHERE id = $1) >= 5 THEN 'failed'
      ELSE 'queued'
    END,
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $3;

-- Heartbeat
UPDATE worker_locks SET heartbeat_at = NOW() WHERE lock_key = 'cold_email_worker' AND owner_id = $4;

-- Audit
INSERT INTO email_events(email_message_id, lead_id, event_type, detail)
VALUES ($1, $3, 'failed', jsonb_build_object('error', $2));

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Upsert email_messages').first().json.id }},   {{ $input.first().json.message || 'SMTP send failed' }},   {{ $('Pick 1 Lead').first().json.id }},   {{ $('Generate Worker ID').first().json.worker_id }}

parameters.query:
SELECT EXISTS(
  SELECT 1 FROM leads
  WHERE email_status = 'queued'
    AND email_valid = true
    AND last_email_sent_at IS NULL
    AND unsubscribed_at IS NULL
) AS has_more;
DELETE FROM worker_locks WHERE lock_key = 'cold_email_worker' AND owner_id = $1;
